title: Design System: Filipa Marques — Coaching & PNL

display.purpose: Hero H1 and blog-article titles. Termina wide geometric sans, max 5.5rem. Falls back to Hanken until Termina is loaded.

headline.purpose: Section H2. Termina, one per section.

title.purpose: Card titles, course names, FAQ. Hanken Grotesk — Termina too wide below ~1.75rem.

label.purpose: Nav, badges, form labels. Uppercase 0.14em tracking.

shadows.name: photo-panel-depth
shadows.purpose: Front panel in layered showcase stacks only.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: GSAP hero clip-path wipe and accent scale.

background.name: soft-wave
background.value: radial-gradient(130% 90% at 50% -6%, rgba(255,95,0,0.16), rgba(255,95,0,0.035) 34%, transparent 76%) on #0A0A0A; no-repeat; not fixed (sized to the full document)
background.purpose: The one continuous soft-wave glow — a single primary bloom from the top that dissolves smoothly down the whole page. Replaces the old grain. Base sections stay transparent to reveal it.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion CTA — squared, Primary fill, neutral text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 36px; border: none; border-radius: 0; background: #FF5F00; color: #0A0A0A; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FF7A2B; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(255,95,0,0.24); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5F00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dark Secondary Button
components.description: Squared ghost on dark — white outline.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 36px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), border-color 220ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5F00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Squared dark contact field with visible label and orange focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9B9B9B; } .ds-input { padding: 13px 16px; border: 1px solid #2E2E2E; border-radius: 0; background: #222222; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.65; transition: border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), box-shadow 220ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9B9B9B; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #FF5F00; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,95,0,0.35); }

components.name: Category Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 0; background: #FF5F00; color: #0A0A0A; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Fixed header — transparent over hero, neutral scrim on scroll. Didone logo.
components.html:
Filipa MarquesCoaching & PNL
  • Sobre
  • Serviços
  • Cursos
  • Contactos
Marcar conversa
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 16px 32px; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; flex-direction: column; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-name { font-family: "Bodoni Moda", Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #FF5F00; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav-tag { margin-top: 4px; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #A6A6A6; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 28px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #FFFFFF; text-decoration: none; opacity: 0.8; transition: opacity 220ms; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55); border-radius: 0; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background 220ms, border-color 220ms, color 220ms; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #FF5F00; border-color: #FF5F00; color: #0A0A0A; }

components.name: Service Row
components.description: Numbered service list row with arrow hover on dark — signature pattern.
components.html: 01Coaching individual
components.css: .ds-service-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 32px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #2E2E2E; color: #FFFFFF; text-decoration: none; } .ds-service-num { font-family: "Termina", "Hanken Grotesk", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 600; color: #FF5F00; min-width: 3.5rem; } .ds-service-title { flex: 1; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, 1.5rem); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-service-arrow { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 0; color: #FFFFFF; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), border-color 220ms; } .ds-service-row:hover .ds-service-title { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-service-row:hover .ds-service-arrow { transform: rotate(45deg); border-color: #FF5F00; }

components.name: Layered Showcase
components.description: Overlapping dual photo panels with offset accent block on dark — FitFlex pattern.
components.html:
Uma abordagem que confias

Mais do que treino mental

Ferramentas concretas para agir.
components.css: .ds-showcase { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center; } .ds-showcase-eyebrow { font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #FF5F00; } .ds-showcase-title { margin: 16px 0 0; font-family: "Termina", "Hanken Grotesk", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-showcase-body { margin: 24px 0 0; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #9B9B9B; max-width: 36rem; } .ds-showcase-stack { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/5; max-width: 32rem; margin-inline: auto; } .ds-showcase-accent { position: absolute; right: 24px; top: 24px; width: 66%; height: 66%; background: rgba(255,95,0,0.14); } .ds-showcase-back { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 68%; aspect-ratio: 3/4; background: #222222; box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.45); } .ds-showcase-front { position: absolute; bottom: 0; right: 0; width: 58%; aspect-ratio: 3/4; background: #2A2A2A; box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); outline: 8px solid #0A0A0A; }

components.name: Blog Pull-Quote
components.description: Raised panel quote with orange-dash attribution (provided blog reference).
components.html:
Curabitur varius eros et lacus rutrum consequat. Mauris sollicitudin enim condimentum.

Piter Bowman
components.css: .ds-pullquote { margin: 0; padding: 40px 48px; background: #222222; border: 1px solid #2E2E2E; } .ds-pullquote-text { margin: 0; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-pullquote-attr { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-top: 24px; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-pullquote-dash { display: inline-block; width: 40px; height: 2px; background: #FF5F00; }

components.name: Blog Hero Title
components.description: Full-bleed article hero — orange badge + giant Termina title + meta (provided reference).
components.html:
Training

5 ways to squat with a barbell properly

Ashton Porter · 17 Nov 2023 · 0 Comments
components.css: .ds-arthero { padding: 40px 48px; background: #0A0A0A; text-align: center; } .ds-arthero-badge { display: inline-flex; padding: 6px 14px; background: #FF5F00; color: #0A0A0A; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-arthero-title { margin: 20px 0 0; font-family: "Termina", "Hanken Grotesk", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 5vw, 4rem); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #FFFFFF; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-arthero-meta { margin: 20px 0 0; font-family: "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #9B9B9B; }

narrative.overview:
Black is the stadium after dark; orange is the floodlight. This is a high-energy, always-dark brand surface — cinematic and modern. The whole site lives on a pure neutral ground (#0A0A0A) carrying one continuous soft wave: a warm primary glow (#FF5F00) that blooms from the top and dissolves smoothly down the entire page — the hero glow, extended, with no seams and no grain. Wide geometric Termina titles carry the energy; Hanken Grotesk keeps reading calm; vivid orange is the rare, deliberate light.

The core layout reference is FitFlex Personal Coach: dark hero, oversized bold titles, overlapping photo panels, brand-logo strip, orange category badges, numbered service lines. Long-form (blog) follows the provided references: full-bleed dark hero with orange badge and giant title, then a readable column with a drop-cap opener and orange-dash pull-quotes.
keyCharacteristics: Always dark: one neutral ground (#0A0A0A) under a single soft-wave glow; no light sections
Soft-wave background — one continuous #FF5F00 radial bloom from the top, no grain, no seams
Termina wide geometric titles + Hanken Grotesk body; Bodoni Moda kept only for the logo
Layered compositions: overlapping panels, bento asymmetry, brand-logo strip
GSAP hero + parallax; progressive enhancement keeps content visible
pt-PT, tu address, motion honours prefers-reduced-motion

rules.name: The Always-Dark Rule
rules.body: There is no light mode. Every ground is the neutral base or a translucent tint of it. Never introduce a light section.

rules.name: The Soft-Wave Rule
rules.body: The background is ONE continuous soft wave: a single #FF5F00 radial bloom from the top of the body, dissolving smoothly down the whole document. No grain, no fixed tiling, no per-section glows. Base sections stay transparent; other bands use translucent tints, never flat solid blocks. Cards are the only solid surfaces (Secondary #222222).

rules.name: The Floodlight Rule
rules.body: Orange is light, and light is rare. Combined primary coverage stays ≤12% of any screen.

rules.name: The Two-Orange Rule
rules.body: Primary #FF5F00 fills buttons/badges (with neutral text) and sets large numbers, links, and eyebrows (clears AA as text on dark). Use Apricot #FF9E66 for softer highlights. Never white text on a primary fill.

rules.name: The Termina-Display Rule
rules.body: Termina at Headline size and above only. Below ~1.75rem, switch to Hanken Grotesk.

rules.name: The One Kicker Rule
rules.body: At most one uppercase tracked label per section, only when it names a category.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Interactive shadows are orange glows. Neutral shadows only on overlapping photo panels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Content rows use 1px separators, not card containers.

rules.name: The Layer-Stack Rule
rules.body: When two surfaces overlap, the front panel gets the deeper shadow and an offset accent block behind.

dos: Do keep the whole site dark: one neutral ground (#0A0A0A) under a single soft-wave glow. No light sections.
Do ship high-energy layout — overlap, parallax, bento asymmetry, brand-logo strip — modelled on FitFlex.
Do set titles in Termina; keep Hanken for body and small titles; keep Bodoni only for the logo.
Do let base bands stay transparent so the soft wave flows; use Secondary #222222 panels for cards.
Do use Primary #FF5F00 fills/badges with neutral text; use Primary/Apricot for orange text on dark.
Do keep every corner square (0px radius).
Do layer content instead of flat card grids.
Do style long-form like the references: orange badge, giant Termina title, drop-cap opener, orange-dash pull-quotes.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion; gate GSAP and marquees behind JS.
donts: Don't introduce a light mode or a cream/beige/white section — the site is always dark.
Don't break the wave with flat solid section bands — base bands stay transparent; other bands use translucent tints.
Don't set Termina below ~1.75rem, or re-typeset the Didone logo in Termina.
Don't use hardcore gym aesthetics (black + orange with no elegance).
Don't go corporate cold — gray-only palettes with no personality.
Don't build identical icon + heading + text card grids (SaaS cliché).
Don't use motivational Instagram-coach tropes (empty quotes, fist-pump stock photos).
Don't use lime-neon accents (wrong register for psychology and coaching).
Don't put white text on a primary fill, or use Gray Mist for body copy (both fail contrast).
Don't put an eyebrow above every section, or number sections that aren't real sequences.
Don't use border-left/right accent stripes, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't hide content behind animation gates — everything must render without JS.
Don't ship the Canva site aesthetic as the visual target — content reference only.
